Latest news

2016-10-31

The website has been moved to the HTTPS protocol. The HTTP API continues to work, however we will recommend you to switch to the HTTPS-version within a few weeks.

2016-04-10

The website has been migrated from Bootstrap to HTML KickStart.

2015-10-20

Any suggestions? Send your suggestions to us to discuss.

2015-09-01

No complaints? Switching in the production mode.

2014-08-29

The service has been started in the debug-mode.

About Us

The AnonDNS allows you to register own name in zone .anondns.net for your dynamic IP address without providing any personal data.

Advantages

We don't require your name, email, phone or other personal data. No need to register! Just register a new name and get a key (token) to manage it!

To update a registered record no special software is required! You could use curl, wget or your favourite browser. Just retrieve a special URL via HTTPS.

Donations

If you would like to donate to this project just send Bitcoins, Litecoins or money via PayPal.
